hooks.command: REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); HEAD=$(git -C "$REPO" rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); mkdir -p "$REPO/.claude" && echo "$HEAD" > "$REPO/.claude/.session_head" 2>/dev/null; echo '{"additionalContext": "BOOT SEQUENCE (SessionStart hook): Before responding, read ALL .md files in project root (including PERSONA.md), scan TASKS/ folder (PRIORITY/ and BLOCKED/ only), run git log --oneline -20, check git status. Generate STATE.md if applicable. This is non-negotiable."}'

python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null | { read -r f; case "$f" in "$HOME"/.claude/*) echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED — Hard Rule #1: Files are memory. All persistence lives in .md files tracked by git, not in ~/.claude/. Retry this write to the correct repo file (PROGRESS.md, TODO.md, PERSONA.md, or the relevant .md file)."}';; esac; }

REPO=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null); MARKER="$REPO/.claude/.session_head"; SENTINEL="$REPO/.claude/.stop_blocked"; if [ ! -f "$MARKER" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$SENTINEL" ]; then rm -f "$SENTINEL" "$MARKER"; exit 0; fi; SESSION_HEAD=$(cat "$MARKER"); CURRENT_HEAD=$(git -C "$REPO" rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); UNCOMMITTED=$(git -C "$REPO" status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ "$SESSION_HEAD" = "$CURRENT_HEAD" ] && [ -z "$UNCOMMITTED" ]; then rm -f "$MARKER"; exit 0; fi; TODO_C=$(git -C "$REPO" diff "$SESSION_HEAD".."$CURRENT_HEAD" -- TODO.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); PROG_C=$(git -C "$REPO" diff "$SESSION_HEAD".."$CURRENT_HEAD" -- PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); TODO_P=$(git -C "$REPO" diff HEAD -- TODO.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); PROG_P=$(git -C "$REPO" diff HEAD -- PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); TODO_S=$(git -C "$REPO" diff --cached -- TODO.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); PROG_S=$(git -C "$REPO" diff --cached -- PROGRESS.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -n "$TODO_C" ] || [ -n "$PROG_C" ] || [ -n "$TODO_P" ] || [ -n "$PROG_P" ] || [ -n "$TODO_S" ] || [ -n "$PROG_S" ]; then rm -f "$MARKER"; exit 0; fi; touch "$SENTINEL"; echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"STOP — Hard Rule #3: RECORD after every interaction. Changes were made this session but TODO.md and PROGRESS.md were not updated. Update both, commit, then end."}'
